title: Ocular
description: This mod improves the visual approach without unnecessary addons by adding shaders to the screen.
body:
Make your Minecraft experience more immersive than ever! Ocular is a client-side mod that adds highly polished, dynamic visual effects directly to your screen based on your environment and actions.

Feel the weather, the battles, and the world around you like never before! 🌍✨

## ✨ Features:
- 🌧️ Dynamic Rain & Water: Raindrops hit your screen and slide down realistically during storms or when splashing in water.
- ❄️ Snow & Frost: Snowflakes stick and melt on your screen, and your breath fogs up the vision in cold biomes.
- 🏜️ Sandstorms: Sprinting on the beach or in a desert? Watch out for sand particles flying into your eyes!
- 💥 Explosion Concussions: Feel the blast! Explosions cause realistic shockwaves, screen blur, and visual disorientation.
- 🩸 Damage Effects: Visceral screen blood and vignettes when taking damage to increase combat immersion.
- ⚙️ Designed to be smooth, lightweight, and unintrusive. Perfect for any vanilla-plus or hardcore modpack!
